name: Model/tool/result/model loop native
objective: Move web finalization failures away from generic deterministic answer-shaping and into typed validator feedback that is returned to the model loop.
scope: model-authored chat_reply remains the only accepted product answer provider for pending web completions
deterministic layer emits validation feedback, receipts, and retry state only
failed completion boundary keeps the run active so the model can gather more evidence or rewrite from typed tool results
nonGoals: no GUI parity claim from this support-only proof
